response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and senior-level, with no indication of willingness to accept an entry-level role; additionally, their resume lacks clear evidence of React or Nest.js usage, PostgreSQL experience, or direct relevance to renewable energy/construction tech, and German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to work with complex systems and integrate diverse data sources
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
concerns: Senior-level title and experience suggest misalignment with entry-level role expectations
No clear evidence of React, Nest.js, or PostgreSQL in recent work
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
